title: En förtjusande fröken
writer: Ralph Benatzky, Börje Larsson, Paul Baudisch
actors: Max Hansen, Annalisa Ericson, Sture Lagerwall
plot: Insurance salesman Paul is to be engaged with Louise, the daughter of his boss. Trying to sell insurance to a millionaire he meet the millionaire's daughter Annette whom he fall in love with after some complications and funny busi...
